title: Shield Me

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hear my cry in the darkness
Listen to my unadorned prayer
Let truth flow from trembling lips
No deceit lives there

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Search my heart in the midnight hour
Test me in the crucible of dawn
What you'll find are wounds and whispers
But no malice drawn

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Shield me beneath your mighty wings
As shadows lengthen all around
Like a precious stone within your palm
Let grace abound

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: They circle like wolves in winter
Their hearts grown cold as stone
Their mouths speak of golden fortunes
While their eyes throne

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Shield me beneath your mighty wings
As shadows lengthen all around
Like a precious stone within your palm
Let grace abound

sections.label: Bridge
lines: But I—I shall behold your face
When morning breaks the night
In righteousness,
I'll wake transformed Bathed in your light

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: All my paths are in your keeping
Though enemies surround my way
Like a child beneath your shelter
Here I'll stay

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Shield me beneath your mighty wings
As shadows lengthen all around
Like a precious stone within your palm
Let grace abound

sections.label: Outro
lines: When at last your glory rises
And all that's hidden comes to light
I shall be content, beloved
In your sight

epigraph: that goeth not out of feigned lips
